title: Giggles Tribute - What I've Done - Linkin Park
description:
THIS WAS FAVORITED BY MONDO MEDIA!!!! :D

This a HTF amv starring Giggles done by me  sandiegoborn32 Enjoy! :D
Music - What I've Done - Linkin Park

lyrics to the song -

In this farewell 
Theres no blood 
Theres no Alibi 
Cause Ive Drawn Regret 
For the Truth 
Of a Thousand Lies 

[Pre-Chorus]
So let Mercy Come 
And Wash Away 
What Ive Done 

[Chorus]
Ive Faced myself 
To Cross out what Ive Become 
Erase Myself 
And let Go of What Ive done 

Put to rest
What you Thought of Me 
Well I Cleaned this Slate 
With the Hands of Uncertainty 

[Pre-Chorus]

[Chorus]

For What Ive Done 
Ill start again 
And whatever pain may come 
Today this ends 
Im Forgiving What Ive Done!!! 

[Chorus]

What Ive Done 
Forgiving What Ive Done


Happy Tree Friends Episodes I used - You're Baking Me Crazy, Every Litter Bit Hurts,  From Hero To Eternity, Who's to Flame, Home is Where the Hurt Is, Eyes Cold Lemonade, Giggles Valentines Day Smoochie, Helping Helps, I've Got You Under My Skin, Class Act, Snow What That's What, Stayin' Alive, Blast From The Past, Aw Shucks, Boo Do You Think You Are, Happy Trails part 2 Jumping The Shark, Idol Curiosity, Snow Place To Go, This is your Knife, Double Whammy Part 1, and Junk In the Trunk.

All the content in this *FAN MADE VIDEO* belongs to the rightful owners!

Video (c)Mondo Media
Audio (c)Linkin Park
